2606.31198.title: Distilling Temporal Coherence into 2D Networks for Transrectal Ultrasound Prostate Video Segmentation
2606.31198.paper_summary: Real-time video segmentation of the prostate in Transrectal Ultrasound (TRUS) is essential for image-guided interventions. While conventional 2D methods suffer from inter-frame inconsistencies by disregarding temporal context, 3D architectures incur prohibitive latency. To resolve this dilemma, we present a Temporally Consistent Learning Framework that distills temporal coherence into a 2D network during training, preserving single-frame inference efficiency. Our design is driven by a key clinical observation: the prostate exhibits geometric stability, whereas the surrounding acoustic environment fluctuates due to physiological motion and transducer pressure. Because conventional temporal constraints propagate erroneous gradients from these unstable regions, we introduce a Confidence-Weighted Temporal Consistency objective derived from optical flow warping residuals, selectively attenuating contributions from unreliable regions. Complementing this pixel-wise constraint, a Dual-scale Prototype Alignment Module enforces semantic coherence through contrastive optimization of local boundary and global semantic features. Furthermore, to eliminate the need for dense per-frame video annotations, we employ geometric equivariance-based pseudo-labeling with knowledge distillation from a pretrained teacher. Extensive experiments on SUN-SEG and our newly introduced TRUS-V benchmark (2,679 frames) demonstrate state-of-the-art accuracy and temporal consistency at real-time speed. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/DYDevelop/DTC-TRUS.
2606.31198.paper_summary_zh: 即時影像分割前列腺在經直腸超音波 (TRUS) 中對於影像導引的介入是至關重要的。雖然傳統的 2D 方法因忽視時間背景而受到幀間不一致性的影響，但 3D 架構則會產生過高的延遲。為了解決這一困境，我們提出了一個時間一致性學習框架，該框架在訓練過程中將時間一致性提煉到 2D 網絡中，保持單幀推斷的效率。我們的設計受到一個關鍵臨床觀察的驅動：前列腺展現出幾何穩定性，而周圍的聲學環境則因生理運動和傳感器壓力而波動。由於傳統的時間約束會從這些不穩定區域傳播錯誤的梯度，我們引入了一個基於信心加權的時間一致性目標，該目標源自光流變形殘差，選擇性地減弱來自不可靠區域的貢獻。作為這一像素級約束的補充，雙尺度原型對齊模塊通過對局部邊界和全局語義特徵的對比優化來強化語義一致性。此外，為了消除對每幀視頻密集標註的需求，我們採用基於幾何等變性的偽標註，並從預訓練教師中進行知識蒸餾。在 SUN-SEG 和我們新引入的 TRUS-V 基準（2,679 幀）上的廣泛實驗展示了在實時速度下的最先進準確性和時間一致性。代碼和數據集可在 https://github.com/DYDevelop/DTC-TRUS 獲得。
2606.31198.author: Dong Yeong Kim et.al.
2606.31198.authors: Dong Yeong Kim, JunGyu Lee, Jaewon Choi, June Young Seo, Myeongseop Kim, Jinwook Choi, Taek Min Kim, Young-Gon Kim
